name: react-compare-slider
title: React Compare Slider
author: nerdyman
description: Compares two caller-provided React nodes with an accessible draggable divider in landscape or portrait orientation.

changes: Prevented disabled handles from receiving programmatic click focus or responding to arrow keys.
Synchronized the default transition with reduced-motion preference after hydration and on preference changes.
Removed console output from the graceful CSS.registerProperty failure path.
Preserved the browser focus indicator and removed disabled handles from sequential keyboard focus.
Made the allowed browser pan axis orientation-aware so portrait sliders remain draggable on coarse pointers.

license.scope: lib/src/react-compare-slider.tsx, lib/src/hooks.ts, lib/src/types.ts, lib/src/consts.ts, lib/src/register.ts, and the required lib/src/components runtime closure

modifications.change: Guarded click-focus and keyboard movement when disabled, and synchronized the default transition with reduced-motion preference after hydration.
modifications.reason: Make the upstream aria-disabled state match actual focus and keyboard behavior while preserving its motion-safe default in server-rendered React hosts.

modifications.change: Removed the catch binding, noConsole suppression, and console.debug call while retaining graceful failure.
modifications.reason: Keep expected duplicate or unsupported custom-property registration failures silent during development and hot reload.

modifications.change: Removed the blanket outline reset and set disabled handles to tabIndex -1.
modifications.reason: Retain a visible native focus indicator and keep disabled sliders out of sequential focus order.

modifications.change: Changed touch-action from pan-y to pan-x for portrait orientation while retaining pan-y for landscape.
modifications.reason: Allow the gesture axis to reach the slider while preserving page scrolling on the perpendicular axis.
